title: Better support for testing with different storage drivers
body: This change updates the test helper macros to pass the right flags to tools to use the storage driver named in `$STORAGE_DRIVER` instead of `vfs`, if the variable is set when the tests are run.  It adds debug logging support to the `imgtype` test helper, and ensures that it actually shuts down storage, even when it exits with errors.
